anomalies.description: CDB-APT-22: 32 advisories (2.9σ above normal), avg risk 9.0
anomalies.recommendation: Prioritize CDB-APT-22 threat hunt — elevated campaign activity detected

anomalies.description: T1059 observed 257x (5.2σ above baseline) — possible coordinated use
anomalies.recommendation: Deploy specific detection for T1059 across all endpoints

anomalies.description: CISA KEV confirmed but EPSS only 0.05% — EPSS may be lagging
anomalies.advisory: U.S. CISA adds Microsoft SharePoint and Zimbra  flaws to its Known Exploited Vul
anomalies.recommendation: Trust KEV signal; override EPSS weight for this advisory

anomalies.description: T1203 observed 163x (3.1σ above baseline) — possible coordinated use
anomalies.recommendation: Deploy specific detection for T1203 across all endpoints
Investigate: coordinated campaign, mass disclosure, or data quality issue
